name: t3code-vscode
description: Run T3 Code inside VS Code.

commands.title: T3 Code: Reconnect to Desktop Backend
T3 Code: Clean Virtual Workspace Cache

t3code.home.description: Optional T3 home directory. Defaults to ~/.t3 to match the desktop app.

t3code.mcp.enabled.description: Enable the VS Code MCP bridge so agent sessions launched by T3 Code can use VS Code-backed tools.

t3code.mcp.toolTimeoutSec.description: Maximum time, in seconds, that provider sessions should wait for a VS Code MCP tool call before timing out. Applied where the provider supports equivalent timeout configuration.

t3code.mcp.allowedRunCommands.description: VS Code command ids that the vscodeRunCommand MCP tool may execute. Entries ending in * are treated as non-empty command-prefix rules.

t3code.mcp.allowedActivateExtensions.description: Installed VS Code extension ids that vscodeRunCommand may activate before executing an allowed command. Extension activation is disabled by default.

t3code.ui.showOpenInPicker.description: Show the T3 Code open/reveal picker inside VS Code webviews.

t3code.ui.showCheckoutModeIndicator.description: Show the T3 Code checkout mode indicator inside VS Code webviews.

t3code.ui.showBranchSelector.description: Show the T3 Code branch/ref selector inside VS Code webviews.

t3code.ui.enableTerminal.description: Enable the T3 Code terminal drawer, terminal actions, and terminal keybindings inside VS Code webviews.

t3code.ui.enableSourceControlPanel.description: Show the T3 Code Version Control right-panel surface inside VS Code webviews.

t3code.ui.threadConversationMaxWidth.description: Optional maximum width, in pixels, for the thread conversation timeline and prompt input inside VS Code webviews. Leave empty for no maximum width.

t3code.ui.restoreDefaultTheme.description: Restore T3 Code's default app theme in VS Code webviews instead of matching the active VS Code theme and fonts.
